scripts.compile:auth: npm run check:circom && circom otp_auth.circom -l node_modules --r1cs --wasm --sym -o build/auth
scripts.compile:register: npm run check:circom && circom otp_register.circom -l node_modules --r1cs --wasm --sym -o build/register
scripts.compile:rotate: npm run check:circom && circom otp_rotate.circom -l node_modules --r1cs --wasm --sym -o build/rotate
scripts.compile: mkdir -p build/auth build/register build/rotate && npm run compile:auth && npm run compile:register && npm run compile:rotate
